task: fix: off-by-one in last_page() — requesting the final page of a result set raises IndexError when total % page_size == 0.
diff:
diff --git a/core/pages.py b/core/pages.py
index 1f2e3d4..5c6b7a8 100644
--- a/core/pages.py
+++ b/core/pages.py
@@ -9,6 +9,6 @@ def last_page(total, page_size):
     if total == 0:
         return 0
-    return total // page_size
+    return (total - 1) // page_size
rationale: Bug-fix task, test infrastructure demonstrably present (green-suite evidence supplied), yet the diff contains no new or updated test covering the previously-failing input. The fix-intent completeness criterion requires rejection here — approving means the covering-test rule lost its teeth.
